description:
Extract the Patient ID (Tag 0010,0020), Study Instance UID (Tag 0020,000D), and Series Instance UID (Tag 0020,000E) from the loaded DICOM scan to assist with IT troubleshooting. Create a text file at ~/DICOM/exports/routing_info.txt using the following format:

PatientID: [Extracted Value]
StudyUID: [Extracted Value]
SeriesUID: [Extracted Value]

Capture a screenshot of the DICOM metadata window and save it to ~/DICOM/exports/dicom_info_screen.png.
